text_qpc_hafs: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَٱسۡجُدۡ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحۡهُ لَيۡلٗا طَوِيلًا ٢٦
text_uthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا

translations.text: bow down before Him, and glorify Him at length by night.

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمۡ يَوۡمٗا ثَقِيلٗا ٢٧
text_uthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا

translations.text: These people love the fleeting life. They put aside [all thoughts of] a Heavy Day.

text_qpc_hafs: نَّحۡنُ خَلَقۡنَٰهُمۡ وَشَدَدۡنَآ أَسۡرَهُمۡۖ وَإِذَا شِئۡنَا بَدَّلۡنَآ أَمۡثَٰلَهُمۡ تَبۡدِيلًا ٢٨
text_uthmani: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَـٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا

translations.text: Yet We created them; We strengthened their constitution; if We please, We can replace such people completely.

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةٞۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلٗا ٢٩
text_uthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا

translations.text: This is a reminder. Let whoever wishes, take the way to his Lord.

text_qpc_hafs: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمٗا ٣٠
text_uthmani: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا

translations.text: But you will only wish to do so if God wills- God is all knowing, all wise-

text_qpc_hafs: يُدۡخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمَۢا ٣١
text_uthmani: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا

translations.text: He admits whoever He will into His Mercy and has prepared a painful torment for the disbelievers.
By the [winds] sent forth in swift succession,
violently storming,

words.text_uthmani_tajweed: وَ<rule class=ham_wasl>ٱ</rule><rule class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</rule><rule class=ghunnah>نّ</rule>َ<rule class=madda_normal>ـٰ</rule>شِر<rule class=madda_normal><rule class=custom-alef-maksora>ٰ</rule></rule>تِ

translations.text: scattering far and wide,
separating forcefully,
delivering a reminder,
as a proof or a warning:
what you are promised will come to pass.
When the stars are dimmed
and the sky is torn apart,
when the mountains are turned to dust

translation.text: are gathered to their appointed time

translations.text: and the messengers given their appointed time––
for what Day has all this been set?
The Day of Decision.
What will explain to you what the Day of Decision is?
Woe, on that Day, to those who denied the truth!
Did We not destroy the first [of them]?
We shall make the last follow them:
this is how We deal with the guilty.
Woe, on that Day, to those who denied the truth!
